feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
feed.subtitle: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition in 4 countries in the EU (Czechia, Slovakia, Poland and Hungary). We have purchased the license for Document and Report Compliance cloud edition (8008260), but up to now have not activated the license for Document and Reporting Compliance for S/4HANA (8013658).

5XU (Document and Reporting Compliance) has always been a scope item in the project, already listed in the DDA. But now, at the end of the Explore phase, it seems like 5XU specifically requires the license for DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) if we want to activate it. Ultimately it all boils down to the need for VAT Report previews, which is essential for us. Without the additional license, it seems like we cannot preview VAT reports.

My main question is if there is any way for VAT Reports to be previewed without requiring the DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) license, or scope item 5XU?

Also, where can I find accurate information about what DRC licenses are required for 5XU?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: India TCS Form 27EQ - Remmitance Challan Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We've posted a customer invoice with the TCS withholding tax codes maintained in the master data. But when we are trying to create the "Remittance Challan - TCS (Customers)", we are getting an error message the "No unpaid tax line exists for the given selection criteria" after providing the necessary details in the selection screen. The Business place and section codes have been given at the time of invoicing, the withholding is also getting calculated for customer invoices but the documents are not getting picked up at the time of "Remmitance". Screenshot of Remmitance Challan TCS Error;

Note,

All the configurations related to TCS and Extended withholding tax has been configured in the "Sandbox" system. The Business Place is also maintained and is assigned to the section codes. 

Can anyone please help us in resolving this issue. 

Thanks

entry.title: Connection between Peppol and My Bank Account in Bydesign
entry.content:
Hello,

It seems that a "Peppol-related" checkbox has been added to the My Bank section in the 2408 update. I have a few questions regarding this.

  1. If I set the "Peppol-related" checkbox for multiple My Bank entries, will all the My Bank entries with the checkbox checked be displayed in the XML?
  2. After multiple My Bank entries are displayed in the XML, when, where, and how is the bank account determined? Is it done within ByDesign or within SAP Document and Reporting Compliance?
  3. Is it mandatory to have a contract for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in order to integrate ByDesign with Peppol?

entry.title: Is DRC a mandatory part of the public cloud purchase for certain countries?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer only has BTP license and they would like to know for Document report compliance solution, does customer has to purchase the public cloud solution in certain countries?

 

Thanks in advance

Helinna

entry.title: E-Invoice Malaysia: Cancelled invoice in LHDN portal.
entry.content:
Hi,

In regards to getting the updated status in EDOC_COCKPIT, I want to know if an invoice is cancelled in the LHDN portal, can we get the status updated in the cockpit. 

So far, I do not see this happening even though technically speaking it could be a possibility with "Get Status" functionality.

Any answers or insights on this are appreciated.

entry.title: about prefix adaptation
entry.content:
How can we maintain the configuration to Number Range and Prefix in eDocument Colombia documents? Where can we make this adaptation?

We kindly ask for your guidance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How we can exclude documents that should be excluded from eDocument process?
entry.content:
In e-waybill process we need to exclude some delivery notes from DRC edocument cockpit. There is a process that use the same delivery type but some documents need to include to  edocument cockpit and some documents should be excluded. How we can manage to exclude documents that should be excluded from edocument process?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP edocument - Support Documents (Documento Soporte - Colombia) XML
entry.content:
According to the documentation (DOC-SUPSAP_S4HANA_CLOUD ), we can create Support Documents (Documento Soporte - Colombia) using either materials or services. However, when processing a Service Entry Sheet (SES), the unit of measure is not being recognized, resulting in an XML parsing error.

How can we address this issue?

entry.title: An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL (Statutory reports)
entry.content:
When downloading a document in the Statutory reports app, we get the message "An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL". 

There's a note describing exactly the same problem (3164880 - DRC - Run Statutory Reports (F1515) - An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL | SAP Knowledge Base Article)

After going through the note we're a bit uncertain if the app can handle DMS on BTP at all or if it requires content server ("the old way") ? We use DMS on BTP and we're on prem 2023. Please let me know if you have an idea... 🙂

Best regards,
Line C.

entry.title: Einvoicing for India
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing Electronic Customer Invoices for India. Can someone please explain what is the exact difference between the Einvoice for Customers Legacy (SAP Cloud Integration or SAP Integration Suite ) and the new Einvoicing for customers (SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition). We need to understand if there is any difference besides the way to push to Tax authority/Government

Please find the Sap help portal links below;

Einvoice for Customers Legacy

Electronic Invoices (Legacy) | SAP Help Portal

Electronic Customer Invoice

Electronic Customer Invoices | SAP Help Portal

Thanks

entry.title: DRC - no data selected by "Switzerland VAT return (CH_VAT_DCL)"
entry.content:
Dear all,

We are trying to implement DRC (document reporting and compliance) in your S4HANA ON PREMISE (2022) system. From my point of view, we have completed the customizing (SPRO path Switzerland->Statutory Reportring->VAT Return->Setting up your statutory reporting), i.e. we have created a new reporting entity, assigned the report categories & org values etc. Additionally, we have completed the tax code mapping settings.

When starting the DRC dashboard, the report (Generate VAT return) is visible and can be started. The result/Document status for the selected period is "Generated Successfully". Anyhow, the XML has no content. I know that there is data in the selected period, because the standard VAT report (RFUMSV00) returns the expected document.

If I am not mistaken, one of the underlying CDS views is I_STRPTAXITEM which contains data as well.

We would like to know how we can debug the selection criteria to figure out the root cause for the missing data. Ideally, DRC would show more data other than just the company code and the date range... For whatever reason it must have excluded the relevant accounting documents. Ideally there is a report which can be used for analyses.

Any proposals?
Regards,
Patrick

entry.title: Emissão Cloud MDFe Oubound campo issuingDateTime
entry.content:
Olá Pessoal,

Alguém já utilizando a versão cloud da SAP para emissão de MDFe ?

Implementamos as Notas e estamos utilizando como base a documentação da classe CL_NFE_CLOUD_MDFE_PROCESSOR conforme orientação da SAP Notes 3287819 - MDF-e Outbound: Processor Class Documentation 

e também usando como base Json do Business Accelerator Hub

Porem, estamos esbarrando no campo issuingDateTime, já dizemos diversos testes com data/hora ou mesmo vazio e não conseguimos passar dessa validação.

Exemplo 1 (sem hora)

Exemplo 2 (hora atual)

Exemplo 3 (- 03hrs)

resposta em todos casos:

Exemplo 04 adiantando o horário com o timezone

Resposta

(imagino que a API entendeu/intepretou o dado)

Exemplo 05 com time zone e data/hora OK
gera uma exceção na API

As demais validações, conseguimos zerar.

Alguma dica ideia?

Obrigado,

Bruno 3J

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition / Recieve E-Invoices
entry.content:
Hallo Experts,

i have a question regarding the ability to recieve e-invoices (for example X-Rechnung here in Germany) in the Public Cloud.
So far we have implemented the sending of X-Rechnung via Email in our TDD System, but what if the company wants to recieve an invoice from a supplier who also sends it from its Public Cloud System via Email (in the X-Rechnung format).
What is the Best Practice for this Scenario ? How can we import this supplier invoice (which is a XML-File) from the email and create it in the Public Cloud manually or even automatically ? 
SAP DRC doesnt seem to offer this functionality yet. Can we leverage Central Invoice Management or SAP Buisness Network ?
Thanks in advance for all suggestions.

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: for IT edocument, we have RE with debit and credit memo with same tax code, how to distingush?
entry.content:
hello experts:

thanks first

you know for MIRO it is RE document type, but we have normal MIRO, and credit memo also.

both are RE type, and tax code is also same. eg: tax code E4

so how to do this value mapping via     /AIF/VMAP   ---->   GET_DOC_TYPE_EXT

it should be different node, right? like REE4 (debit) --> TD01   and  REE4 (credit) ---> TD04

thanks again for your advice

entry.title: Use of EDOC transactions to manually import supplier invoice?
entry.content:
Hello eDoc experts,

I am looking for a pre-existing solution that would allow us to manually load a supplier invoice which is in XML format and coded according to the en16931 standard into our SAP ERP EHP8 in order to create the logistics invoice verifiction document. At the moment the users do manual MIRO transation from printed PDF which is obviously tedious; my hope is that we could semi-automatically process the XML files and at least pre-populate the invoice verification data.

If I understand the documentation correctly, the use SAP Document and Reporting Compliance can indeed be used for that (plus a lot more than I am looking for).

Before I go down the path of implementing all the notes needed for the electronic document processing framework (e.g. 3403461 and all that follows), I wanted to find out whether this would indeed give me what I am looking for meaning: use the various EDOC transaction like  EDOC_INBOUND_UPLOAD,  EDOC_INBOUND_MSG or EDOC_COCKPIT to achieve the above stated aim?

I'm not looking for automatic import of invoices from or any of the other fancy stuff. Just a way to process in the XML file and without having to write our own upload program to achieve it?

Also, is there additional licencing associated with using this?

Much appreciated.

Patrick

entry.title: Fill Port details in E-waybill XML for Export scenario
entry.content:
How to send the Port details in the E-Waybill XML for export scenario?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to generate an XAF audit file Netherlands
entry.content:
Hello,

we got the request from our dutch accountant to generate an XAF File for Auditors. Although XAF seems to be obligatory since 2010 we were not aksed until now to provide such information. When I check  the Support Portal I found a lot of notes how to establish this function by using the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance but these are all valid only for S/4 HANA.

So although we have licensed SAP DRC due to other request we do not have S/4 HANA at the moment, we are still running on ECC 6.18.

There are also some very rough descriptions how to enable ECC by using DART and AIF to generate this file but these explanation are not detailed enough and AIF Setup is not really smart.

I would be pleased if somebody with an SAP ERP 6.18 share his/her customer expierence with me how to deal with this challenge.

Regards

Holger

SAP ERP SAP Document and Reporting Compliance FIN (Finance) SAP Application Interface Framework

entry.title: SAP DRC for Germany - suppliers flows only
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm starting to implement SAP DRC in Germany but the customer would like to activate only the suppliers inbound features. Do I install all OSS SAP notes for Peppol listed in the "2783795 - Electronic Document Processing for Peppol Countries/Regions: Implementation Overview" note and also all the OSS SAP notes listed in the "2690949 - Electronic Document Processing for Germany: Implementation Overview" note?

At this time, I wouldn't install notes also for customer invoices but I would like to minimize the effort.

Thanks and regards,

Francesca

entry.title: Error in XML display in edocument Cockpit for SII Spain
entry.content:
When trying to display an XML file generated from an eDocument in the cockpit  for SII the following error appears:

I have rewieved all the configuration guide and can´t find the gap.

entry.title: User needs only display access in EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app in SAP S4 Hana Production.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We received a request from the user who needs only display access in EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app for Spain entity in SAP S4 Hana Production.

We tested the EDOC_COCKPIT tcode/app in the QS4 Test environment, and it allows all operations, including change/cancel/delete/submit. Even activity is limited with "Display".

Could you please check and let us know if there is any feasibility to restrict only display version.

Regards,

Srinu Nelli

SAP Security & GRC
